violations.text: 1. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by containers of soda. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC informed. 2. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. COS. 3. Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. COS. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

2 door lowboy was observed at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Orange juices that bear a label to keep refrigerated were in cooler. PIC decided to voluntarily dispose of juice. No food or beverages that require refrigeration to be stored in 2 door lowboy. Establishment has adequate refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
The receptacles in the toilet room are lacking covers. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024
The surrounding wall by kitchen interior door frame was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024
